description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week Ethan Qiu logged 2 hrs 57 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 35 mins. His work was spread across 5 projects, and the most-used languages were TypeScript, JSON, JavaScript, and Markdown. No new GitHub commits, pull requests, or repositories were recorded in the data.
